Published Notices

⏰ Update Academy Timings

This will update the timings shown in the Contact section on the website.

✅ Timings updated!

📍 Update Academy Location

This will update the location address shown on the website and the Google Maps link.

✅ Location updated!

📱 Update WhatsApp Number

Enter the number with country code (without +). e.g. 923455691688

✅ WhatsApp updated!

🛡️ Update Academy Logo

Upload a new logo. It will appear in the navbar, hero section, and footer.

✏️ Edit About Section

Each card has an icon, title, and description. Edit and save — changes appear instantly on the website.
